title: common: add ssh.ExecWithOutput to allow streaming output
body: Follow-up to 2681204 that added ExecWithInput, allowing executing commands over SSH while passing an optional input reader. For cases where remote > local output needs to be streamed, add a similar ExecWithOutput that returns a ReadCloser.

comments.body: Thanks! (I didn’t read the code ~at all.) Is there an expected user in the Podman ecosystem?

Ah, yes, I should've mentioned this, but this is a requirement for implementing support for https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28321. For supporting *-dir formats between remote to local/remote ie "save image on remote host and stream it back". I'm yet to raise the PR on podman, which uses this.
#913 is adding a `context.Context` parameter to a ssh function. @Honny1 is it desirable/valuable to add it to other code paths, like this one, as well?
